section.title: Jira
section.subtitle: Sync this project's specs with a Jira board

creds.baseUrlHelp: Your Jira Cloud site or Data Center server URL.
creds.emailHelp: Required for Jira Cloud — the email of your Atlassian account.
creds.tokenHelp: Create one at id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens. It is stored encrypted on this machine and never leaves it.

mapping.intro: Statuses are matched automatically by category (To Do / In Progress / Done). Override any state if your workflow uses custom names.

status.enabledHelp: When on, specs sync with Jira and rail outcomes update the linked issues.
status.pausedHelp: Sync is paused. Specs stay on the board but no longer update Jira.
status.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this project from Jira? Existing specs stay on the board; sync stops.

outbox.title: Pending Jira updates
outbox.deadHelp: These couldn't be applied automatically (e.g. your workflow has no matching transition). Fix in Jira, then retry.

authExpired.title: Jira disconnected
authExpired.body: Your Jira token expired or was revoked. Reconnect to sync {{count}} pending update(s).
